texto: I do believe most curators - maybe I'm only speaking for myself here - want to be artists on some level. Curators must have an innate interest in what an artist makes. And they certainly have their opinions and criticisms, and the always ask, "How would I have made this, or how would another artist make this?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Stroud Marion Boulton que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “I do believe most curators - maybe I'm only speaking for myself here - want to be artists on some…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, artists, curators, com foco em curators.
